app.title: Gold Fix Tracker
app.metaDescription: A React gold price tracker using the free Free Gold API — line and bar charts, day-over-day direction views, no API key.
app.heroTitle: Gold price tracker — historical & recent USD prints.
app.heroBody: Chart gold in U.S. dollars per troy ounce across any date window you choose, and export the same series you see on screen. Works on static hosting with no backend or API keys.
app.dataExplainer: Data is loaded from freegoldapi.com (JSON, CORS-enabled, no API key). It blends historical and recent sources into one USD series; granularity varies by period (annual, monthly, or daily).
app.rangeSeriesHint: Pick a calendar window, confirm the gold series, then use “Load gold series” to refresh the chart.
app.emptyObservations: No data points in that date range. Try widening the window — very old ranges may be annual-only.
app.chartStudioBody: Line and bar focus on price levels; pie and donut summarize how often day-over-day moves were positive, negative, or flat inside your window.
app.footer: Gold tracker built with React, Material UI, Zustand, and the Free Gold API. No server or keys required for deployment.
app.initFailed: Unable to initialize the gold tracker.
app.loadFailed: Something went wrong while loading gold data.

errors.htmlInsteadOfJson: Received HTML instead of JSON. Check your network or try again later.
errors.invalidJson: The server returned data that is not valid JSON.
errors.genericLoad: Unable to load gold price data.
errors.fredApiError: Could not load data for this date range.
errors.networkUnreachable: Could not reach the data server. Your network may be blocking this site or the connection dropped.

networkIssue.title: Network or access issue
networkIssue.body: This app could not load data from the internet. That often means a corporate firewall, proxy, or filter is blocking the request, or your device is offline.
networkIssue.bulletFirewall: Ask your network or security team whether outbound HTTPS to the data host is allowed.
networkIssue.bulletVpn: If you use VPN or split tunneling, try another network or disconnect VPN to test.
networkIssue.bulletIt: Share this screen with IT: they can verify DNS, TLS inspection, and allow‑list rules for external APIs.

summary.title: Bullion signal
summary.subtitle: Snapshot for the active series and date window (USD per troy ounce).
summary.bullishDrift: Bullish drift across the selected window for this series.
summary.bearishDrift: Pressure eased across the selected window for this series.
summary.rangeLowHelp: Lowest price printed inside the window.

chart.noObservations: No gold observations are available for this range. Try widening the dates.
chart.tabsHint: Line tracks the price level; pie and donut summarize day-over-day direction counts.
chart.lineSubtitle: Gold in U.S. dollars per troy ounce, plotted across your selected window.
chart.barSubtitle: Compare the first and last price in this range — a simple read on directional drift.
chart.barNotEnough: Not enough data for a bar comparison.
chart.pieSubtitle: Each slice counts trading days where the price moved up, down, or was flat versus the prior point — not a weighting of holdings.
chart.pieNeedTwo: Need at least two data points in range to score up/down/flat days.
chart.donutSubtitle: Same daily-direction counts as the pie tab, tightened for slide-friendly viewing.
chart.footnote: Source: Free Gold API. Frequency varies by era; pie and donut need consecutive points to infer direction.

noscript: You need to enable JavaScript to run this app.
